---
title: "Week 9: Object-oriented programming (vctrs)"
summary: "Extend object-oriented programming with vctrs-based classes and a stronger type system."
prepare: "Review the vctrs documentation and the related Advanced R material before class."
resource_label: "vctrs documentation"
resource_url: "https://vctrs.r-lib.org"
focus:
  - "The vctrs type system"
  - "Designing custom vector classes"
  - "Coercion and casting"
  - "Connecting vctrs ideas back to S3"
---

```{r}
week <- 9
source(here::here("course_info.R"))
```

```{r}
#| output: asis
show_week_overview(week)
```

## Main references

* [13 *Advanced R*](https://adv-r.hadley.nz/s3.html)
* [vctrs](https://vctrs.r-lib.org)

## What you will learn this week


```{r}
#| output: asis
show_slides(week)
```

```{r}
#| output: asis
show_assignments(week)
```
